category_sources: source_facts.description says Sphinx is a tool to create intelligent and beautiful documentation; official sphinx-doc.org page says it creates documentation with rich formatting, cross-references, and multiple output formats.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sphinx-doc; official sphinx-doc.org page brands the project as Sphinx.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage redirects to the official Sphinx documentation site at sphinx-doc.org/en/master.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub repository sphinx-doc/sphinx identifies itself as The Sphinx documentation generator and links to sphinx-doc.org.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes documentation generation; official sphinx-doc.org documents reStructuredText/MyST authoring, API documentation, themes, and extensions.
